title: Kocha
description: A Modpack with automation and magic for a longer experience and playtime.
body:
Flying around with a jet pack or swinging around like Spiderman is only a couple of the endless possibilities that are possible with this mod pack. Whether it is filling the world with automation and contraptions or exploring the multiple worlds that are waiting to be conquered; come and join the adventure.

This is a great modpack to play with friends being able to join and host your world using the "Essential mod" without having a sever and being able to play far away in the same world.

If you happen to dislike villagers like I do or just wanted each villager to have a name, then with the ability to pick them up and put them in a cozy warm box instead of them leaving and wasting your hard work to freeze in the cold; don't let Carl die in the cold. With this, all is possible, and even more with making mob farms easier than ever.

If you ever wanted to do rituals then now is your chance with magic such as spirits and demons to help you automate and mine with tools and jewelry with your familiars and other possibilities to explore.
